title: Social avoidance test
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6t3k0","text":"Protocol for social avoidance test performed by rats","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"99qhm","text":"All procedures were carried out following the guidelines on the ethical use of animals from the Council Directive of the European Communities (2010/63/EU) and were approved by the Italian Ministry of Health ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Leave the rats in the behavioral room for acclimation for at least 1 hour before the test, and perform the marble burying test between 9:00 am and 16:00 pm

Place the rat in a circular open field arena (88 cm diameter) containing a protective cage (13 cm × 13 cm) placed on a side of the arena, defined as interaction zone (IZ) and allow free exploration for 5 minutes
Estimate the total time spent in the IZ with no target (NT) by the automated video tracking system EthoVision XT17 (Noldus, The Netherlands)
Place a novel rat matched for age and sex in a side of the cage and allow free exploration for 5 minutes
Estimate the total time spent in the IZ with the social target (ST) by the automated video tracking system EthoVision XT17 (Noldus, The Netherlands).
creator: Ada Ledonne
